data.title: Cycurion, Inc. prices $6.0 million private placement under Nasdaq rules with a single institutional investor.
data.description: Cycurion, Inc. has disclosed the pricing of a private placement worth $6.0 million, conducted at-the-market under Nasdaq rules. The placement was made with a single institutional investor.

data.title: Ekso Bionics to distribute BalanceTutor™ in US - exclusive agreement with MediTouch; leading exoskeleton tech company.
data.description: Ekso Bionics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: EKSO) recently revealed a significant agreement with MediTouch Inc. The collaboration designates Ekso Bionics as the exclusive authorized sales agent and distributor of MediTouch's BalanceTutor™ rehabilitation system in the United States. Ekso Bionics, a top player in exoskeleton technology for medical and industrial purposes, and MediTouch, headquartered in Tnuvot, Israel, are set to enhance rehabilitation procedures in the U.S through this partnership. The announcement was made on Dec. 04, 2025, marking a notable development in the field.

data.title: Curaleaf opens new Cape Canaveral dispensary, making it the 70th in Florida and 159th nationwide.
data.description: A recent expansion along Florida's Space Coast has added another store to Curaleaf Holdings, Inc.'s portfolio, bringing the total number of stores in the state to 70 and nationwide to 159. The announcement was made on December 4, 2025, by the Stamford-based company, Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. (CSE: CURA) (OTCQX: CURLF), known for its wide range of consumer cannabis products on the international market.

data.title: 57% of government social services workers believe data and technology will increase efficiency in 2026, per Equifax survey.
data.description: The first Equifax Social Services Outlook Index reveals that 57% of government social services employees believe that utilizing data and technology will enhance efficiency in the upcoming year. This is expected to expedite the delivery of aid to applicants. The report was issued by Equifax® (NYSE: EFX) based in Atlanta on December 4, 2025.

data.title: Argus Research begins coverage on CTW Cayman (NasdaqCM:CTW) with Equity Research Report. Date: Dec. 4, 2025. Click for details.
data.description: Argus Research, a renowned independent investment research firm, announced on December 4, 2025, the initiation of Equity Research Report coverage on CTW Cayman (NasdaqCM:CTW). To access the comprehensive Argus Equity Research Report, follow the provided link. Key insights from the report by Argus Analyst reveal significant company highlights regarding CTW Cayman.

data.title: Market rallied with Dow Jones futures rising; Snowflake stock fell due to poor earnings outlook after bullish moves by Tesla and Robinhood.
data.description: Today, there was a significant uptrend in the market, driven by the positive performance of Tesla and Robinhood. However, Snowflake faced a decline following its latest earnings projection. Dow Jones futures saw an increase after a successful rally led by Tesla and Robinhood. This surge comes after Snowflake experienced a drop due to its outlook.

data.title: Potential 50% MSTR stock rebound on strategy’s 'unicorn' pattern: Target could reach $200, extend to $280 with macro support and bullish momentum.
data.description: Shares of MSTR have the potential to reach $200, with a possible extension up to $280 if favorable macroeconomic conditions continue to be supportive and bullish technical momentum persists.

data.title: Intensity Therapeutics to present at the 2025 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium, focused on cancer therapies.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Shelton, Connecticut, Intensity Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: INTS) announced its focus on developing unique cancer treatments through non-covalent, drug-conjugation technology. This late-stage clinical biotechnology company is dedicated to pioneering proprietary therapies.

data.title: Adman Jimmy Smith excels by pushing boundaries with ease.
data.description: Jimmy Smith is known for his ease with words. The advertising professional has made a name for himself as a leader in the industry by constantly pushing boundaries and thinking outside the box. Smith's innovative approach has gained attention, with many acknowledging his ability to captivate audiences and deliver impactful messages. This has led to significant success in his career, earning him a reputation as a trailblazer in advertising.

data.title: Cango's revenue surged 60.6% to $224.6 million in Q3. The company plans to shift from bitcoin mining to AI infrastructure.
data.description: Cango Inc. reported a 60.6% increase in revenue in the third quarter, amounting to $224.6 million, attributed to new mining capacity and rising bitcoin prices. The company is now transitioning towards building a global AI compute grid network. Despite the sharp drop in bitcoin prices in the final quarter of the year, Cango executives laid out plans to address the industry's volatility and highlighted a long-term vision of operating high-performance computing centers for AI applications, which they believe will be critical infrastructure in the future. The company also symbolically ended its use of Chinese yuan and American depositary receipts, aiming for greater transparency. With a background in car-related services, Cango is navigating the challenges and opportunities in the virtual currency and AI sectors.

data.title: David Jeremiah's Turning Point ministry brings Christmas cheer to prisons, emphasizing evangelism.
data.description: This Christmas season, the Turning Point program hosted by Dr. David Jeremiah in San Diego is extending its reach to prisons with a focus on evangelism. Dr. Jeremiah's broadcast ministry emphasizes spreading the Gospel globally, recognizing the importance of sharing the message of hope and faith. This initiative highlights the significance of reaching out to those incarcerated, offering spiritual support during the holiday season. The program's efforts aim to impact a significant number of prisons, conveying positivity and light to individuals in challenging circumstances.

data.title: REX American Resources Q3 2025 net income per share to shareholders is $0.71, reflecting interests in 6 ethanol facilities.
data.description: Dayton, Ohio-based REX American Resources Corporation, a prominent ethanol producer, revealed its financial and operational performance for the fiscal third quarter of 2025. The company, listed on the NYSE as REX, primarily owns stakes in six ethanol production plants. Notably, the results for this quarter include One Earth Energy, LLC, and NuGen Energy, LLC ethanol facilities. The specific financial figures and operational details were not disclosed in the provided information.

data.title: Islamic Civilization Center in Uzbekistan wins Prix Avicenne 2025 award, set to open in March 2026.
data.description: In TASHKENT, Uzbekistan, the recently established Islamic Civilization Center is set to open its doors to the public in March 2026 after being honored with the esteemed Prix Avicenne 2025 award. The center, located within the National Academy of Medicine, has garnered recognition for its cultural and religious significance.
